message:
refactor(command,server): use let-chain syntax for cleaner pattern matching

fr-command: Replace nested if-let + inner-if patterns with Rust
let-chain syntax (if let Ok(s) = ... && s.eq_ignore_ascii_case(...)
&& ...) in GEOSEARCH/GEOSEARCHSTORE, GEORADIUS/GEORADIUSBYMEMBER,
SORT, and MEMORY USAGE key extraction. Reformat long condition lines.

fr-server: Apply let-chain syntax in propagate_writes_to_replicas
for the sent_offset < primary_offset check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
